guest1.name: Sophie Martin
guest1.text: A magical stay! The welcome was warm, the rooms are magnificent and breakfast on the terrace is unforgettable.

guest2.name: John Smith
guest2.text: The most authentic Moroccan experience. The staff went above and beyond to make our stay perfect. The hammam is a must-try!

guest3.name: Maria Garcia
guest3.text: An authentic paradise in the heart of the medina. The decoration is spectacular and the service impeccable. We will definitely return.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: A heritage of over 200 years
about.paragraph1: Riad Al Andalous was born from a passion for traditional Moroccan architecture. Built over two centuries ago, this palace has been meticulously restored to preserve its authenticity while offering modern comfort.
about.paragraph2: Every zellige, every arch, every lantern tells a story. Our riad is a true living museum where Moroccan craftsmanship is celebrated in every detail. The centuries-old traditions of Moroccan hospitality are expressed through our daily rituals: the tea ceremony, shared meals around the same dish, and the warm welcome reserved for each guest.
about.paragraph3: We perpetuate ancestral customs while adapting them to our time. Discover the magic of summer nights under the stars, the enchanting scents of souk spices, and the art of Moroccan living in all its splendor.
